title: Figure 2 from: Lu C-T, Ren Y-L, Habib K, Zhang Q-F, Liu L-L, Kang J-C, Shen X-C, Wijayawardene NN, Al-Rejaie SS, Loinheuang C, Li Q-R, Long Q-D, Elgorban AM (2025) Two new species of Nigropunctata and the first report of sexual morph of Melanographium citri (Pallidoperidiaceae, Xylariales) from south-western China. description: Figure 2 Melanographium citri (GMB4902). A. Material; B. Ascomata on the surface of host; C. Cross-section of ascoma; D, E. Longitudinal sections of ascoma; F. Peridium; G–I. Asci with ascospores; J. Paraphyses; K. Ascus apical apparatus (stained in Melzer's reagent); L. Ascospore with germ slits; M. Ascospore in Indian ink; N. Culture on PDA. Scale bars: 0.2 mm (B–D); 100 µm (E); 10 µm (F–M).
